product_overview: LifeOS MVP is an invite-gated web workspace that guides a partner through a weekly operating loop. It helps the user set context, shape the week, choose today’s next actions, and reflect to close the loop.
core_goals: Set up the starting context for the weekly loop
Review and shape a realistic week of work
Identify and progress through today’s next actions
Reflect on the week and close the loop

features.name: Onboarding surface guidance
features.description: Provides the partner with guided onboarding actions and shows what completing the current step unlocks as they begin the weekly loop.
user_flows: Navigate to /mvp/onboarding -> Read the current action for onboarding -> Complete the onboarding step -> Read what the completed step unlocks -> Continue to the next step in the weekly loop

features.name: Weekly review guidance
features.description: Helps the partner shape and confirm a realistic week by presenting the current action and the outcome unlocked by completing it.
user_flows: Navigate to /mvp/weekly -> Read the current action for weekly review -> Complete the existing weekly review action -> Read what completing the step unlocks -> Move forward in the weekly loop

features.name: Today surface guidance
features.description: Guides the partner through the current day’s next actions and shows the immediate outcome of completing each step.
user_flows: Navigate to /mvp/today -> Read the current action for today -> Complete the existing today action -> Read what completing the step unlocks -> Proceed to the next recommended action

features.name: Reflection surface guidance
features.description: Supports the partner in reflecting on the week and closing the loop by showing the current action and its outcome.
user_flows: Navigate to /mvp/reflection -> Read the current action for reflection -> Complete the reflection step -> Read what completing the step unlocks -> Close the weekly loop

routes.description: Guides a partner to build the starting context for the weekly loop
Guides a partner to shape and confirm a realistic week
Guides a partner through the current day's next actions
Guides a partner to reflect and close the weekly loop

features.name: Partner-facing weekly loop guidance
features.description: Replaces internal implementation briefs with a current action and the outcome unlocked by completing each partner step while leaving the admin brief unchanged
user_interactions: Read the current action for Onboarding, Weekly Review, Today, or Reflection
Read what completing the current step unlocks
Complete the existing form or action on the selected surface
Navigate through the existing weekly loop

known_limitations.issue: The fixed mobile navigation dock can overlap guidance while scrolling
known_limitations.impact: Some guidance may be partially obscured on narrow viewports; this is outside the current diff
